# CopilotRevive Skills Index

These skills were extracted from the reusable migration cookbooks in `CopilotRevive/cookbooks`.

## ADF to Spring

- `adf-to-spring-entity-generator`
- `adf-to-spring-repository-generator`
- `adf-to-spring-controller-service-generator`
- `adf-to-spring-mvc-test-generator`
- `adf-to-spring-integration-test-generator`
- `adf-to-spring-unit-test-generator`

## ADF to Angular

- `adf-to-angular-component-improver`
- `adf-to-angular-components-code-generator`

## Oracle to PostgreSQL

- `oracle-to-postgres-logic-and-data-convert`

## Swing to Angular

- `swing-to-angular-table-dialog-migrator`
- `swing-to-angular-validation-migrator`

## Obligatory Standards (auto-applied on every AI-assisted change)

The following skills are mapped from `cookbooks/` and must be applied whenever the conditions described
in each skill are met. They were created by the `transformation.cookbooks.mapper` agent in response to
issue **"Hello Worldd - Java Update to current version"**.

- `obligatory_ai-generated-comment` — Enforce the `generated by AI in Github cloud` comment on every new file and class (from `cookbooks/ai-generated-comment-guideline.md`)
- `obligatory_java-code-practices` — Enforce good Java code practices for any Java update, refactor, or migration task (from `cookbooks/java-to-python-migration-good-code-practices.md`)
- `obligatory_mermaid-architecture-docs` — Enforce Mermaid-based architecture documentation when creating or updating architecture docs (from `cookbooks/mermaid-architecture-documentation-guideline.md`)
